name: Endless Swings Indoor Golf
about: Endless Swings Indoor Golf in Stafford, VA, offers an indoor golfing experience accessible in any weather condition. Players can choose from over 1,000 real golf courses from around the world using the facility's simulators. The venue provides a space for both casual play and serious practice, with options for booking tee times, joining leagues, or taking data-powered lessons to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 1,000 real-world golf courses from around the globe
Data-powered lessons to take their game to the next level
Competitive rates and membership options for regular play
Ability to play and practice regardless of weather conditions

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether they provide club rentals or if customers must bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on outside food and drink, so it's recommended to contact them directly for details.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time it takes to complete an 18-hole round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be family-friendly, offering services and an atmosphere that can accommodate juniors and youth golfers.
